disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Abrupt high fever and rigors preceding a fiery red, sharply raised, advancing facial plaque
trigger_question_examples: Did the fever and shaking come on suddenly before the rash, and is the rash edge sharply raised?
How high is the fever and how fast is the rash spreading?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — the shaking and high fever came first, then within an hour the fiery raised rash, and it's spreading fast.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Redness advancing toward the eyes; screen for eye pain, double vision, or pain on eye movement
trigger_question_examples: Any eye pain, double vision, pain when moving your eyes, or trouble seeing?
Is the swelling closing your eye or affecting your vision?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My eyes still move okay and my vision is normal for now, but the redness is creeping toward my eyelids.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: My eyes feel okay I think.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No purple/black blisters, skin numbness, crackling, or pain wildly out of proportion (necrotising screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any purple/black blisters, numb patches, or crackling under the skin?
Is the pain far worse than the skin looks?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No purple blisters or numb patches or crackling — it's very sore but not out of all proportion.
